case_title: BANTOLA, LARRY vs. DAVISON, CHERYL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANTOLA, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVISON, CHERYL DOE 1 THROUGH DOE 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-15-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-16-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-27-2000
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2001, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 8-15-01.

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON NOV-14-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LAWRENCE A MANN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-29-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY MANN LAWRENCE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-24-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LAWRENCE A MANN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-08-2001 CONTINUED FROM JAN-24-2001 TO MAR-28-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-28-2001, PLTF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY MANN LAWRENCE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-12-2001 CONTINUED FROM MAR-28-2001 TO JUN-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-20-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LAWRENCE A MANN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2001 CONTINUED FROM JUN-20-2001 TO AUG-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
